programmes.show_description: Tense action. A single mother on holiday in Morocco is forced to take the law into her own hands after her child is abducted, but ends up being framed for murder. (2015)
Thriller with Western star James Coburn. A professor about to start a new job as a government adviser must eliminate all traces of his past as an industrial spy - with deadly consequences. (1974)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. In another Hayes Cooper adventure, Mormons and their wagon train must be defended from outlaws. S6, Ep8
Romano and Hooker pursue a van for a traffic violation and end up tackling a gang of ex-bikers involved in gun-running. S1, Ep4
Vincent is called upon to meet a cargo vessel that has recovered debris from a suspected saucer crash. However, when he arrives, the alien fragments are missing.
Fiery fantasy starring Marc Singer (BeastMaster). After an evil warlord summons a terrifying mythological beast, a young hero must complete gruelling trials to awaken a fearsome dragon ally. (2009)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
High seas adventure with Orson Welles. A boy joins a voyage in search of a pirate's treasure, but the ship is taken over by the buccaneer's former crew, who plan to seize the riches. (1972)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!

Fantasy adventure with Stephen Moyer. A squire pretending to be a knight tries to convince King Arthur to send him on a quest to recapture legendary sword Excalibur from a Viking raiding party. (1997)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
En route to the Federation archives at Memory Alpha, the Enterprise encounters a strange energy field which takes over the mind of a lieutenant aboard the ship. S3, Ep18/24
When a top General in the army learns of the alien threat he comes up with a dangerous ruse to bring the Invaders to the negotiation table, but will it backfire?
Hooker and his partner Romano try to protect an important witness in a murder trial. S1, Ep5
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Country music star Lila McCann guest stars as an aspiring singer. S6, Ep9
Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. An ex-assassin is blackmailed into eliminating a target who is on a expedition, sending the hit-man on a perilous climb up the Eiger. (1975)
Crime starring Keanu Reeves. An undercover cop, disillusioned by the death of his wife, is questioned in the murder of an officer and must find evidence to clear his name. (2008)
Crime thriller with Justin Timberlake. A student becomes the protege of a corrupt gambling tycoon in Costa Rica, only to come under pressure from the FBI to help bring his boss to justice. (2013)
Thriller with Sean Patrick Flanery. When a hospital is taken by terrorists, a decorated veteran is forced to face the demons from his past as he uses all the skills at his disposal to free it. (2021)
Legend returns soon.
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Country music star Lila McCann guest stars as an aspiring singer. S6, Ep9
Hooker and his partner Romano try to protect an important witness in a murder trial. S1, Ep5
When a top General in the army learns of the alien threat he comes up with a dangerous ruse to bring the Invaders to the negotiation table, but will it backfire?
Exhilarating adventure with Alex Carter. A scientist tries to gather DNA from as many animals as possible before a tectonic shift causes rising sea levels to wipe out all life on Earth. (2012)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Richard Boone. A man recruits a prospector to help him save his sister from a band of Apaches, but is forced to endure a terrible challenge to bring her safely home. (1975)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Philip Carey. Colonel Custer comes out of retirement, furthering his political ambitions by fighting to take control of the Little Bighorn campaign. (1965)
When a plague sweeps through the Enterprise, the crew head to a nearby planet to search for an antidote, where they meet an immortal being and his daughter. S3, Ep19/24
Vincent and Scoville ambush an alien briefcase exchange, and the evidence they obtain suggests there is an Invader in high government in Washington.
Hooker is convinced that his latest murder investigation is linked to an unsolved case from eight-years ago - and that he might be searching for a serial killer. S2, Ep1
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. A corrupt sheriff fakes an accident to disguise his murder of a trucker who refused to help his drug smuggling. S6, Ep10
Crime thriller starring Mark Wahlberg. A former smuggler heads to Panama to protect his brother-in-law from a ruthless drug lord and to score millions of dollars in counterfeit bills. (2013)
Thriller with Christopher Lambert. After witnessing a murder, an executive is marked for death by a ninja cult, but receives help from a modern-day samurai who has an ancestral feud with them. (1995)
